title: EPIGENOMICS AND METABOLOMICS MECHANISMS FOR A GENE X DIET INTERACTION MODULATING AGE-RELATED OBESITY
author: Smith C Lai C Parnell L Lee Y Corella D Tucker K Ordovas J
content: S-EPMC6227257 PMC6227257 EPIGENOMICS AND METABOLOMICS MECHANISMS FOR A GENE X DIET INTERACTION MODULATING AGE-RELATED OBESITY Abstract A functional variant in the apolipoprotein AII (APOA2) gene (rs5082) predisposes homozygous carriers to age-related obesity when habitual saturated fat (SFA) intake
